MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- PLAINTIFF STEPHEN M WILLIAMS' Motion To Tax Cost Or In The Alternative To Strike Memorandum Of Costs -- Granted -- costs reduced to $271.80. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

Motion For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John L. Fitzgerald, Esq. of PINNACLE LAW GROUP 394-5700, for defendant Warren Hinckle
Stephen M. Williams, Esq. appearing in propria persona 292-3656, opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court granted DEFENDANT WARREN HINCKLE's Motion For Attorneys' Fees as to the amount of $5,000. Costs will be determined in hearing for motion to tax costs set for 4/28. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
